description: You are a warehouse automation engineer preparing a multi-robot fleet for coordinated order fulfillment simulation in Webots. The world contains 3 robots (ROBOT_A, ROBOT_B, ROBOT_C) in a 10x10 meter warehouse arena. Fix the communication subsystem by ensuring all Receiver nodes on ROBOT_A and ROBOT_B are set to channel 1 to match the Emitters, and update all Emitter range values to 15.0 meters for reliable coverage. Additionally, add a Receiver node to ROBOT_C (at position 3,3) with its channel set to 1. Save the corrected world to /home/ga/Desktop/warehouse_comms.wbt.
